name: dashboard-ultimate
description: Personal dashboard static app validation scripts.

scripts.patch: npm run patch:index-storage && npm run patch:v73-core && npm run patch:v72-storage && npm run patch:v75-focus
scripts.check: npm run patch && npm run check:syntax && npm run smoke:coach && npm run audit:main-storage && npm run audit:dead-code && npm run audit:static && npm run audit:prototypes && npm run audit:storage && npm run audit:lines && npm run audit:size && npm run audit:v74 && npm run audit:index && npm run audit:secrets
scripts.check:syntax: node --check assets/core/safe-storage.js && node --check assets/core/store.js && node --check assets/core/router.js && node --check assets/ud-v72-godmode-pack.js && node --check assets/ud-v73-command.js && node --check assets/ud-v74-ops-features.js && node --check netlify/functions/coach.js && node --check tools/patch-index-storage.js && node --check tools/patch-v73-core.js && node --check tools/patch-v72-storage.js && node --check tools/patch-dead-code-v75-focus.js && node --check tools/audit-main-storage-report.js && node --check tools/audit-dead-code-report.js && node --check tools/smoke-coach.js && node --check tools/audit-static.js && node --check tools/audit-v74.js && node --check tools/audit-index-debt.js && node --check tools/audit-secrets.js && node --check tools/audit-prototypes.js && node --check tools/audit-storage-direct.js && node --check tools/audit-line-length.js && node --check tools/audit-size.js
